name: dm_onboarding
description: Welcome first-time DM users with a scripted onboarding flow and Stripe payment links
author: CupBots
intent: Configure first-time DM welcome flow with Stripe payment links

marketplace.tagline: Convert landing page visitors into paying subscribers via WhatsApp DM
marketplace.long_description: Detects first-time DM users from your landing page, sends a high-converting 3-5 message onboarding flow tailored to their intent, then drops the Stripe payment link. Returning users go straight to AI chat.
